name: falloff_rot_multi
description: Reference-parity: per-vertex WEIGHTED MULTI-AXIS rotation (RX+RY composed in one operation) under a linear falloff. The reference applies ONE composed rotation matrix R blended toward identity per vertex by falloff weight: after = pivot + ((1-w)I + w*R)*(before-pivot). This single-matrix blend reproduces every captured vertex within 0.001 (validated at gen time); a per-axis SEQUENTIAL blend does not. Ground truth for the MS-4 matrix-state fold.

input.argstring: prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
